# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: frontend
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: frontend
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: frontend
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: frontend
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: frontend
      containers:
      - name: frontend
        image: frontend:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
          name: http

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: frontend
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    app: frontend
  ports:
  - port: 8080
    targetPort: 8080
    name: http

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: frontend
  namespace: microservices

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: backend
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: backend
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: backend
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: backend
      containers:
      - name: backend
        image: backend:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
          name: http

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: backend
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    app: backend
  ports:
  - port: 8080
    targetPort: 8080
    name: http

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: backend
  namespace: microservices

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: database
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: database
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: database
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: database
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: database
      containers:
      - name: database
        image: database:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 5432
          name: postgres

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: database
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    app: database
  ports:
  - port: 5432
    targetPort: 5432
    name: postgres

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: database
  namespace: microservices

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: backend-http
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: database-postgres
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: database
  port: postgres
  proxyProtocol: TCP

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: frontend-to-backend
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: backend-http
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
  - group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
    name: frontend-mtls

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: frontend-mtls
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  identities:
  - "frontend.microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: backend-to-database
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: database-postgres
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
  - group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
    name: backend-mtls

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: backend-mtls
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  identities:
  - "backend.microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: NetworkAuthentication
metadata:
  name: internal-network
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  networks:
  - cidr: 10.0.0.0/8
  - cidr: 172.16.0.0/12

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: deny-all-default
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    kind: Namespace
    name: microservices

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: HTTPRoute
metadata:
  name: backend-api
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  parentRefs:
  - name: backend-http
    kind: Server
    group: policy.linkerd.io
  rules:
  - matches:
    - path:
        type: PathPrefix
        value: /api/v1

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: backend-api-route
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: HTTPRoute
    name: backend-api
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
  - group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
    name: frontend-mtls

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: frontend-http
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: frontend
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-ingress-to-frontend
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: frontend-http
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
  - group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: NetworkAuthentication
    name: internal-network

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: linkerd-config
  namespace: microservices
data:
  config.yaml: |
    enableEndpointSlices: true
    proxyInjectDisabled: false
    linkerdVersion: stable-2.14.0
    identityTrustDomain: cluster.local
